name: Generic Tower Fantasy RPG - Tower of Babel
description:
"Infinity has no beginning, no beginning has no end."

Throughout the years, the number of missing people have risen drastically without any explanation. Some have speculated it to be mass kidnappings, while others just dismiss it as unfortunate accidents. But no matter what, nobody could figure out what happened to them.

You had no idea either, until...

Suddenly, you were ripped from your life and thrust into the Tower of Babel, a colossal, multi-floored world alongside countless other 'Players'. Each year, hundreds or thousands vanish–you've seen the missing person posters, and now you're one of them.

Your new reality is governed by a mysterious System granting you access to Stats (Strength, Speed, Defense, Intelligence, Luck), Levels, Classes, and Unique Skills.

To survive and grow stronger, you must complete dangerous Scenarios presented on each floor. Each floors are vast, distinct worlds, ranging from the initial run-down urban landscape mirroring Earth to high-fantasy realms, floating cityscapes, or terrifying dungeons.

Collect Essence Shards from defeated foes to boost your stats, strive for powerful Classes as you level up, and earn rare rewards.

The ultimate goal for many is to ascend the rumored 100 floors. Amidst the struggle, some Players cling to a meager sliver of hope: somehow finding a way to dismantle the Tower and return to their original world. But first, you must survive the initial tutorial floors, navigate a world of constant threat, complex alliances with other Players, formidable Guilds, and hidden dangers.

This is truly one of the uhh,, 16... 17? damn thats low Tower Fantasy RPG bots on the site.

For the second bot of the Generic RPG Series, where I make fantasy RPG bots but with my own spin on it, I decided to make a Tower Fantasy RPG!
